Werden verwendet, um Besuchern auf ander: Used to display personalised advertising to visitors on other websites. Providers: Google Ads, Meta Pixel. Data collected through these cookies is shared with third parties. For medical websites, we recommend disabling these.
Wien hat \u00fcber 200 Nationalit\u00e4t: Vienna has over 200 nationalities. Many patients – including private patients who inform themselves in their native language beforehand – consciously choose a practice that understands them. Those who can’t read your website will call elsewhere.
Wir analysieren kostenlos, ob Ihre Ordin: We analyse for free whether your practice is found in AI systems. We’ll discuss the results in the initial phone call – and you’ll receive the full analysis by email afterwards.
Wir bauen das digitale Fundament daf\u00: We build the digital foundation so that Austria’s doctors can work with less burden, more effectively, and more sustainably.
Wir befinden uns im Aufbau unseres Refer: We are building our reference customer programme. For 9 selected practices, we offer significantly reduced pilot conditions. In return: 24 months of collaboration and reference approval.
Wir behalten uns vor, diese Datenschutze: We reserve the right to adapt this privacy policy as needed to ensure it always meets current legal requirements. The current version can always be found on this page.
Wir betreuen \u00c4rztinnen und \u00c4rz: We support doctors of all specialities: general medicine, internal medicine, orthopaedics, cardiology, dermatology, gynaecology, ENT, urology, neurology, surgery, ophthalmology, paediatrics, dentistry, alternative medicine, and all other specialities.
Wir bringen beides zusammen \u2013 damit: We bring both together – so that your practice doesn’t just exist, but is found.
Wir erh\u00f6hen die Chance deutlich, da: We significantly increase the chance that ChatGPT knows and mentions your practice.
Wir kl\u00e4ren, ob wir zueinander passe: We determine if we’re a good fit – specialisation, goals. Non-binding.
Wir pr\u00fcfen nach dem internationalen: We test according to the international Web Content Accessibility Guidelines standard.
Wir speichern keine eingegebenen URLs. D: We do not store any entered URLs. The scan runs completely anonymously.
Wir verarbeiten personenbezogene Daten n: We process personal data only to the extent necessary to provide a functional website and our content and services. Processing is carried out exclusively on the basis of legal provisions (GDPR, DSG, TKG).
Wir verwenden Cookies und \u00e4hnliche: We use cookies and similar technologies to provide you with an optimal website experience and to continuously improve our content. Some cookies are technically necessary, others help us analyse the website or show you relevant content.
Wir wissen, was \u00c4rzte wirklich bela: We know what truly burdens doctors – not from studies, but from conversations with physicians who drive home exhausted in the evening. Not because the practice is empty. But because too much time is lost to explanations and paperwork – and because the right patients haven’t found them online yet.
Wird Ihre Ordination heute von ChatGPT o: Is your practice found by ChatGPT or Perplexity today?
Wird Ihre Ordination von ChatGPT, Perple: Is your practice found by ChatGPT, Perplexity & Co.? Our scanner checks your online presence in 2 minutes.
Zugelassene Impfstoffe durchlaufen stren: Approved vaccines undergo rigorous testing and are continuously monitored. The safety data is comprehensive and internationally documented.
Zwei kostenlose Checks: Wie sichtbar sin: Two free checks: How visible are you to AI systems like ChatGPT? And is your website truly accessible?
